situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix. segmentation.ts loadFromIDB/saveToIDB each call openDB() but never db.close(). In background service worker, every OCR detection opens new IndexedDB connections without releasing them, causing resource leak over long sessions.
action: Replace per-operation openDB() with module-level singleton getDB() that caches IDBDatabase instance. Added onversionchange handler for graceful close on external upgrade. Stacked on existing opt-background-1783213292 worktree via case-104 direct-edit escape hatch (cp-guard triggered due to prior unmerged SZ-BG-M-* commits on same file).
outcome_evidence: commit f3b8dd3 pushed origin auto/opt-background-1783213292; replaces openDB() (line 234-243) with getDB() singleton + _dbInstance/_dbOpenPromise caching + onversionchange cleanup; loadFromIDB and saveToIDB now reuse cached connection
next_suggestion: SZ-BG-L-002: Anthropic API call hardcodes media_type as image/png regardless of actual format
SZ-BG-L-003: setPanelBehavior called twice — redundant top-level call

audit_findings.finding: openDB() creates new IDBDatabase connection per call; loadFromIDB/saveToIDB never close returned connection. Service worker long-lived → connection accumulation.
audit_findings.remediation: Module-level singleton getDB() with cached IDBDatabase instance + onversionchange handler for graceful invalidation.
